name: io.github.SAP/fiori-mcp-server
description: SAP Fiori - Model Context Protocol (MCP) server

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to opt out of SAP Fiori tools usage analytics telemetry.
environmentVariables.name: SAP_UX_FIORI_TOOLS_DISABLE_TELEMETRY

environmentVariables.description: Path to a custom CA certificate file (.pem, .crt, .cer, .cert) for environments with self-signed SSL certificates.
environmentVariables.name: NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS

environmentVariables.description: Set to '0' to disable SSL certificate validation entirely. Not recommended for production use.
environmentVariables.name: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED
